name: backfill-tenet-evidence
purpose: Reads decisions.jsonl and tenets.jsonl and backfills each tenet's evidence array with references to decisions that cite it via tenet_alignment.
notes: Hard-wires .planning/system-wide-standardization. Depends on JSONL source-of-truth tenet. Supports --dry-run. Uses mixed require/import (CJS wrapper for ESM read-jsonl).

name: generate-decisions
purpose: Generates DECISIONS.md — the human-readable implementation reference for the system-wide standardization overhaul — from JSONL source files (decisions, tenets, directives, ideas).
notes: Implements JSONL-source-of-truth pattern (T2/D79). Outputs .planning/system-wide-standardization/DECISIONS.md. Sections are heavily SoNash-domain-specific but the generator pattern is portable.

name: generate-discovery-record
purpose: Generates DISCOVERY_RECORD.md — the human-readable view of all planning decisions, tenets, directives, and ideas — from JSONL source files. Documented as the template for all future ecosystem view generators.
notes: Per-file comment: 'This script is the TEMPLATE for all future ecosystem view generators.' Reads coordination.json for status. Output: DISCOVERY_RECORD.md. Follows D79/T2 pattern.

name: render-todos
purpose: Generates TODOS.md from .planning/todos.jsonl; also exportable as a library function renderTodos() for programmatic invocation by todos-cli.js.
notes: Dual-mode: script entry point (--dry-run) + exportable library. Priority/status sort logic is portable. Used by todos-cli.js after mutations. Emits archived as <details> block.

name: todos-cli
purpose: Mutation CLI for .planning/todos.jsonl; replaces Write-tool overwrites with advisory-locked, regression-checked, pre/post integrity-validated mutations, then invokes renderTodos().
notes: Created to prevent silent data loss (T30 — compaction-race drop). Subcommands: add, edit, complete, progress, delete, reprioritize, archive, validate. Uses withLock from safe-fs. Regression guard via assertRegressionGuard. Strongly portable pattern.

name: validate-jsonl-md-sync
purpose: Validates that generated MD views (DECISIONS.md, DISCOVERY_RECORD.md, TODOS.md) match their JSONL sources by running each generator in --dry-run mode and comparing output. Exits non-zero if any MD is stale. Enforced at pre-commit (D84/D85).
notes: Normalizes timestamps before comparison (stable across runs). Part of pre-commit hook chain for planning JSONL changes. Pattern is portable; generator list is project-specific.

name: planning-lib-read-jsonl
purpose: Shared JSONL parser for planning scripts; handles comments, empty lines, CRLF, parse-error warnings, and fatal read errors using safe-fs streamLinesSync.
notes: Also exports escapeCell() for Markdown table escaping. Used by all planning script generators. Distinct from scripts/lib/read-jsonl (root lib) — this is the ESM variant. planning/lib/package.json forces type:module.

name: planning-lib-package-json
purpose: Forces ESM module resolution (type: module) for the planning/lib subdirectory so read-jsonl.js can use ES module import syntax.
notes: Minimal: only {"type": "module"}. Required because parent scripts/package.json may not set ESM globally.

name: check-tools
purpose: Checks availability of repo-analysis tools (Tier 1: scc/semgrep/lizard/jscpd/gitleaks/git-quick-stats/repomix; Tier 2: knip/vulture/dependency-cruiser/madge/cloc/tokei) and returns a JSON manifest. Supports --pretty for human-readable output.
notes: Created Session #257. CJS (require). Companion to install-tools.sh. Used by /repo-analysis skill D6 graceful degradation. Outputs JSON manifest with tier/availability/version/error per tool.

name: install-tools
purpose: Installs Tier 1 repo-analysis tools (scc, semgrep, lizard, jscpd, gitleaks, git-quick-stats, repomix) with cross-platform fallback chains (go install, brew, GitHub release download, npm -g). Non-fatal — missing tools warn, never error.
notes: Created Session #257. Windows primary locale; Mac/Linux supported. Includes Zip Slip and Tar Slip prevention (path traversal check before extraction). NPM package versions pinned (jscpd@4.0.8, repomix@1.13.1). OpenSSF Scorecard compliance notes inline.

name: validate-research
purpose: Validates integrity of deep-research pipeline outputs across 8 checks: source traceability, claim coverage, findings inventory, confidence reconciliation, post-pipeline delta, bidirectional claim-to-report, source freshness, and verification verdict persistence. Writes state to .claude/state/research-validation.jsonl.
notes: Supports --topic filter and --fix mode (auto-corrects metadata counts). 8-check validation model maps directly to deep-research pipeline contract. CJS. Writes to .claude/state/research-validation.jsonl. Highly portable pattern.

name: decrypt-secrets
purpose: Decrypts .env.local.encrypted into .env.local using AES-256-GCM with PBKDF2 key derivation. Supports TTY passphrase prompt, stdin flag, and SECRETS_PASSPHRASE env var. Skips if .env.local already has tokens.
notes: Operator-only (user scope). AES-256-GCM, PBKDF2 100k iterations, salt=32B, iv=16B, tag=16B. Atomic write via temp+rename. Secure file mode 0o600. Checks for GITHUB_TOKEN/SONAR_TOKEN/CONTEXT7_API_KEY to detect pre-existing .env.local. CJS. Companion to encrypt-secrets.js.

name: encrypt-secrets
purpose: Encrypts .env.local into .env.local.encrypted using AES-256-GCM. The encrypted file can be safely committed to the repository. Supports TTY passphrase prompt and SECRETS_PASSPHRASE env var.
notes: Operator-only (user scope). Companion to decrypt-secrets.js. Validates passphrase length >= 8. Atomic write. Checks for actual token values (not placeholders) before encrypting. CJS. Note: does NOT use sanitize-error.cjs — uses inline getErrorMessage helper.

name: skills-analyze-self-audit
purpose: Per-skill self-audit for /analyze: validates CAS floor, completeness (analysis.json + extraction-journal + EXTRACTIONS.md mtime), router Handoff Contract (4 handler SKILL.md headers), routing log, and partial-execution recovery.
notes: Dims 1,3,5,8,9 covered; Dim 6 N/A (router is deterministic); Dim 7 light. Covers 4 handler skills: repo-analysis, website-analysis, document-analysis, media-analysis. Mirrors .claude/skills/analyze/. CJS.

name: skills-document-analysis-self-audit
purpose: Per-skill self-audit for /document-analysis: validates per the SELF_AUDIT_PATTERN.md framework (9 dimensions, Complex tier). Specific to document-analysis handler outputs.
notes: Mirrors .claude/skills/document-analysis/. Distinct from analyze/self-audit.js — different dimension coverage appropriate to handler role. CJS.

name: skills-media-analysis-self-audit
purpose: Per-skill self-audit for /media-analysis: validates per SELF_AUDIT_PATTERN.md framework.
notes: Mirrors .claude/skills/media-analysis/. CJS. Per D8b carry-forward: self-audit scripts in scripts/skills/ mirror the pattern from hook-ecosystem-audit's scoring.js (each skill owns its own verification script).

name: skills-repo-analysis-self-audit
purpose: Per-skill self-audit for /repo-analysis: validates per SELF_AUDIT_PATTERN.md framework.
notes: Mirrors .claude/skills/repo-analysis/. Distinct from scripts/repo-analysis/ cluster (check-tools.js, install-tools.sh). CJS.

name: skills-skill-audit-self-audit
purpose: Reference implementation per-skill self-audit for /skill-audit: all 9 dimensions (Complex tier), state-file-driven, includes orphan detection via git-grep, stub-marker scanning, YAML frontmatter check, regression detection, and cross-reference integrity.
notes: Explicitly documented as 'reference implementation' for SELF_AUDIT_PATTERN.md. Dim 6 reworked from multi-agent to deterministic cross-reference integrity check (Session #281 D11). 9 MUST dimensions for Complex tier. Security: validatePathInDir + refuseSymlinkWithParents on all file paths. CJS. 839 lines.

name: skills-synthesize-self-audit
purpose: Per-skill self-audit for /synthesize: validates per SELF_AUDIT_PATTERN.md framework.
notes: Mirrors .claude/skills/synthesize/. CJS.

name: skills-website-analysis-self-audit
purpose: Per-skill self-audit for /website-analysis: validates per SELF_AUDIT_PATTERN.md framework.
notes: Mirrors .claude/skills/website-analysis/. CJS.

name: resolve-dependencies
purpose: Dependency-aware task ordering for ROADMAP.md: reads [depends: X1, X2] annotations, builds a DAG, runs Kahn's topological sort, and outputs ready/blocked/completed tasks.
notes: CJS (require). Supports --all, --json, --blocked flags. Implements topological sort (Kahn's BFS) + DFS circular-dependency detection. Regex DoS guards (S5852 — bounded quantifiers). Multi-line [depends:] continuation support. ROADMAP.md path is project-specific.

name: check-review-record
purpose: Post-commit hook utility: detects fix-prefixed PR review commits (fix: PR #N RN or fix(scope): PR #N RN) and warns if no corresponding JSONL record exists in .claude/state/reviews.jsonl.
notes: Non-blocking (warn only — post-commit cannot reject). CJS. Guard: require.main check so tests can require() helpers without triggering git call. Exports parseReviewFixCommit, toInt, idToString, recordMatches, hasReviewRecord. Handles id-string and pr/round fields, plus title round extraction. This is scripts/hooks/ (NOT .claude/hooks/). Decision D8/D18 from review-data-architecture deep-plan 2026-04-17.

name: sonarcloud-server
purpose: MCP server providing 4 SonarCloud tools (get_security_hotspots, get_issues, get_quality_gate, get_hotspot_details) via stdio transport. Requires SONAR_TOKEN env var.
notes: ESM. SSRF protection: only sonarcloud.io/sonarqube.com allowed (SONAR_ALLOW_LOCAL flag for dev). Proxy support via HTTPS_PROXY/HTTP_PROXY env vars (undici ProxyAgent). 100-page pagination safety limit. Input max 500 chars. Exports 4 tools via MCP SDK. Companion: manifest.json, package.json, sonarcloud.mcpb (packaged zip).

name: sonarcloud-mcp-package-json
purpose: NPM package manifest for sonarcloud-mcp: declares ESM module type, entry point, and @modelcontextprotocol/sdk dependency.
notes: Declares: name=sonarcloud-mcp, type=module, main=sonarcloud-server.js. SDK dep: ^1.26.0. Node >=18 engine. Also has package-lock.json (not inventoried separately as config).

name: sonarcloud-mcp-manifest-json
purpose: MCP server manifest declaring 4 tools, user config fields (SONAR_TOKEN required, SONAR_URL optional), and server entry point metadata for MCP registry/installer integration.
notes: manifest_version: 0.3. author: SoNash Project. Tools: get_security_hotspots, get_issues, get_quality_gate, get_hotspot_details. SONAR_TOKEN marked sensitive:true. Contains ${user_config.SONAR_TOKEN} template ref.

name: sonarcloud-mcpb
purpose: Packaged MCP bundle (zip archive containing manifest.json + node_modules/.package-lock.json) for MCP marketplace/installer distribution of the sonarcloud-mcp server.
notes: .mcpb = zip archive. Contains manifest.json and packaged node_modules lock. Binary artifact (3.2MB). Gitignored or committed for distribution. Not human-editable directly.
